pageContext.name: Wenwu
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Wenwu!  From Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings, this Wenwu Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Shang-Chi fans, don't miss your chance to add the Wenwu statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
